|  |  |     bg: rgba(31,31,29,0.5)                         ||  |     active: gradient #b8ff34 -> #47cbf2
|  |  |     active width: ~63px / 399px total              ||  |
|  |  |                                                   ||  |
|  |  |  RIGHT: Show [9 v] Per Page                        ||  |
|  |  |  <- gap: 8px, 16px uppercase medium                ||  |  <- dropdown: border 1px #1f1f1d, rounded-full
|  |  |     same pill style as filter dropdown              ||  |     p:16px, with chevron
|  |  +---------------------------------------------------+|  |
|  +-------------------------------------------------------+  |
+=============================================================+

* Per spec overrides:
  - No breadcrumb on card
  - Title displayed below post type (not in Figma design)
  - Pill follows page accent color
  - Excerpt below title
  - Learn more button below excerpt
  - 1 post per line (single column)
  - Learn more / pagination center aligned
  - Show N per page at top, on same filter line
  - Block title and search placeholder editable
  - Option for load more button or pagination
  - Option to display filters or not
  - Option to display show N per page or not
  - Filters show all searchable public post types
  - Filter by button filters by post type
  - Pagination style applied to default WP pagination

children.name: Container
children.description: Max-width wrapper with horizontal padding (32px sides)

children.name: Header Area
children.description: Contains heading + filter/search controls, gap 64px between heading and filters

children.name: Heading
children.description: Block title - Anton Regular 64px, editable. Text: 'Search Results' (default, editable per spec)

children.name: Filters Section
children.description: Contains search bar, filter button, clear all, and results count. Gap 16px between rows

children.name: Search + Filter Row
children.description: Horizontal flex row, gap 16px. Search field fills available space.

children.name: Search Input
children.description: Pill-shaped input (rounded-full) with search icon on left. Height 51px, white bg, 1px border #1f1f1d. Placeholder 'Search' (editable per spec). Per spec: search bar should be on its own row

children.name: Filter By Button
children.description: Pill button with chevron dropdown. 1px border #1f1f1d, rounded-full, 16px padding. Per spec: filters by post type, shows all searchable public post types. Per spec: displayed on new line below search

children.name: Clear All Button
children.description: Text-only button (no border), 16px padding. Uppercase medium. Per spec: shown when filters active

children.name: Results Count Row
children.description: '1-9 OF OVER 36 RESULTS' - underlined text, 16px uppercase medium, height 51px. Shows pagination summary.

children.name: Results List
children.description: Single-column grid of search result cards, gap 32px

children.name: Search Result Card (repeated x9)
children.description: Full-width card with 1px border #1f1f1d, border-radius 25px, padding 24px, internal gap 24px. Per spec overrides: no breadcrumb, title below post type pill, excerpt below title.

children.name: Post Type Pill
children.description: Tag/pill showing post type. Per spec: follows page accent color. In Figma: bg #b2eae7, border 1px #00b8b0. Rounded-full, 8px padding, 14px uppercase medium.

children.name: Title
children.description: NOT in Figma design but required per spec override. Post title displayed below post type pill.

children.name: Excerpt
children.description: Post excerpt text. 16px medium, line-height 1.5. Search keyword matches shown in bold (700 weight).

children.name: Learn More Button
children.description: Tertiary-style button with right arrow. 16px uppercase medium. Arrow ~20x16px rotated chevron. Gap 8px.

children.name: Footer Area
children.description: Contains pagination (left) and per-page selector (right), justify-between layout. Per spec: pagination/learn more should be center aligned. Per spec: Show N per page at top on same line as filter.

children.name: Pagination
children.description: Numbered page links (1, 2, 3, 4, ..., next arrow). Each cell 71x61px, px:32 py:24. 12px medium. Below: progress bar (4px tall, rounded 10px, gradient fill #b8ff34 -> #47cbf2 on rgba(31,31,29,0.5) track). Per spec: block should have option to choose between load more button or pagination. Per spec: pagination style should be applied to default WordPress pagination on the theme.

children.name: Show N Per Page
children.description: 'SHOW [9 v] PER PAGE' - text labels flanking a dropdown. Gap 8px. 16px uppercase medium. Dropdown: bordered pill with chevron. Per spec: should be at top, same line as filter. Per spec: block should have option to display or not.

possiblyOptional.reason: Present in Figma design on each card, but spec override explicitly says 'no breadcrumb'
possiblyOptional.visualEvidence: Visible in Figma as 'BREADCRUMBS > BREADCRUMBS' at top of each card

possiblyOptional.reason: NOT present in Figma design, but spec override requires it: 'display title below post type'
Present in Figma as body text with bold keyword highlighting. Required per spec.
possiblyOptional.visualEvidence: Visible in Figma as 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit finances consectetur.'

possiblyOptional.reason: Per spec: 'Block should have option to display filters or not'
possiblyOptional.visualEvidence: Visible in Figma. Editor toggle required.

possiblyOptional.reason: Per spec: 'Block should have option to display show N per page or not'
possiblyOptional.visualEvidence: Visible in Figma at bottom right. Editor toggle required.

possiblyOptional.reason: Shows '1-9 OF OVER 36 RESULTS' with underline. Appears to be a summary of pagination state.
possiblyOptional.visualEvidence: Visible in Figma on second row of filter area

layoutRecommendations.approach: Single-column layout (grid-cols-1) for all breakpoints. This is fundamentally different from the Archive block which uses multi-column grids. The Search block displays results as full-width list items stacked vertically with 32px gap.
responsive: Desktop (1440px): Full layout as designed - heading, search bar on own row, filters below on new line, per-page selector on same line as filters (right-aligned), results in single column, pagination centered at bottom
Tablet (768px): Search bar stacks to full width, filter button and per-page selector stack or wrap. Cards remain single column. Pagination may need to simplify.
Mobile (375px): All elements stack vertically. Search bar full width. Filter button full width. Per-page selector full width or hidden. Pagination numbers reduce (mid_size: 0).
specOverrideNotes: CRITICAL: Search bar should be on its own row (separate from filter button)
CRITICAL: Filter by button filters by post type, shows all searchable public post types (not taxonomies like Archive block)
CRITICAL: Filters displayed on new line below search bar, like Archive block pattern

CRITICAL: On the card: no breadcrumb, pill with post type follows page accent color, display title below post type (not in design), display excerpt below title, display learn more button below excerpt
CRITICAL: 1 post per line with same card shape as design (border, rounded corners, padding)
CRITICAL: Learn more or pagination should be center aligned
CRITICAL: Show N per page at top, on same line as the filter
CRITICAL: Block should have option to choose between load more button or pagination
CRITICAL: Block should have option to display filters or not
CRITICAL: Block should have option to display show N per page or not
CRITICAL: Block title and search placeholder should be editable
CRITICAL: Pagination style should be applied to default WordPress pagination on the theme
keyDifferencesFromArchive: Search block searches ALL public post types, not a single configured post type
Filter is by post type (not taxonomy) - acts as a type selector rather than taxonomy facet
Single column card layout vs Archive's multi-column grid
Card content: post type pill + title (spec added) + excerpt + learn more (no image, no breadcrumb)
Search bar on its own dedicated row, filters on separate row below
Per-page selector moves to filter row (top), not pagination row (bottom)
Pagination component has a unique progress bar below numbers with gradient fill
Block heading is editable (Archive uses ThemeHeading with eyebrow/description/buttons)

paginationDesign.numbers: Horizontal row of page number cells (71x61px each, px:32 py:24, 12px medium font)
paginationDesign.ellipsis: Shown as '...' in same cell style
paginationDesign.nextArrow: 40x40px container with right-pointing arrow icon (gradient-filled circle in Figma)
paginationDesign.progressBar: 4px tall bar below pagination numbers, full width of pagination area. Track: rgba(31,31,29,0.5) with 10px border-radius. Fill: gradient (#b8ff34 to #47cbf2), width proportional to current page / total pages. Left-rounded only on fill.
paginationDesign.note: This is a custom pagination pattern not seen in the Archive block. Should be built as a reusable pagination component or applied to WordPress default pagination via CSS.

pendingQuestions.question: No mobile Figma node was provided. How should the search bar, filters, and pagination reflow on mobile?
pendingQuestions.context: Only desktop node 678:33982 was available. The spec says to 'infer from desktop'. The Archive block stacks filters vertically on mobile with max-sm:w-full.
pendingQuestions.impact: Responsive behavior for search input, filter button, per-page selector, and pagination needs to be inferred from the Archive block reference patterns.

pendingQuestions.question: The Figma design shows a gradient-filled circle for the pagination next arrow (green/teal gradient). Is this the same next-arrow icon used elsewhere in the theme, or a unique pagination-specific element?
pendingQuestions.context: get_design_context shows a 40x40px frame (681:35117) containing the arrow. The gradient appears to be #b8ff34 -> #47cbf2, matching the progress bar gradient.
pendingQuestions.visualEvidence: Visible in pagination screenshot as a gradient circle with right arrow.
pendingQuestions.impact: Need to determine if this is a standard theme icon or needs a custom SVG/CSS treatment.

pendingQuestions.question: The spec says 'pill with post type follows page accent color'. In Figma, the pill uses hardcoded #b2eae7 bg and #00b8b0 border (teal accent). Should the pill use the theme's accent-lighter/accent-light tokens which change per page accent, or the Figma teal colors?
pendingQuestions.context: The Archive block's resource card uses accent-lighter bg with accent-light border on taxonomy pills. This would make the pill color dynamic based on page accent.
pendingQuestions.visualEvidence: Figma shows teal (#b2eae7/#00b8b0) which matches the default accent colors in the theme.
pendingQuestions.impact: Determines whether the pill color is dynamic (theme accent) or static (always teal).
